message:
chore(deps): bump asupersync 0.2.0 → 0.3.0 (crates.io v0.3.0)

- crates/fp-runtime/Cargo.toml: `asupersync = { version = "0.2.0",
  optional = true, default-features = false }` → `{ version = "0.3.0",
  optional = true, default-features = false }`.
- Cargo.lock: refreshed via `cargo update`.
